raw_consumer_statement:
XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX, CA XXXX XXXX Company Name : Best Buy/My Best Buy Visa Account Number : XXXX On XX/XX/XXXX, I purchased a camera from XXXX for {$2400.00} using my My Best Buy Visa credit card. The camera was never delivered to my home address, yet I was charged the full amount. 

I disputed this charge with Best Buy Credit Services, explaining that I never received the merchandise. On XX/XX/XXXX, I received a letter denying my dispute claim, stating they had " documentation '' showing " the merchant provided what was expected. '' However, they have failed to provide any specific proof of delivery to my address. 
I have never received the camera I paid for, and Best Buy has not provided : Proof of delivery to my address Signature confirmation Delivery photo documentation Tracking information showing successful delivery I filed a dispute with Best Buy Credit Services which was denied in a letter dated XX/XX/XXXX. I have also contacted Best Buy customer service multiple times regarding the missing package without resolution. 

I am seeking either : A full refund of {$2400.00} to my credit card account, OR Delivery of the camera I purchased I believe Best Buy Credit Services is violating the Fair Credit Billing Act by holding me responsible for merchandise that was never delivered. This situation has caused me significant financial hardship and stress. 

I certify that the information provided is true and accurate to the best of my knowledge. 

XXXX XXXX XXXX XX/XX/XXXX
